text: In this environment, I feel a blend of anticipation and nostalgia. The voices around me speak of farewells and hope for reunion—there’s a gentle longing in the air, as if we are all on the cusp of something new. The spaces are vibrant and curious, full of knowledge and possibility, yet the words remind me of impermanence. Standing here, I am both participant and observer, contemplating connection, transition, and the fleeting nature of our encounters.
